widgets_values: If there is a person/character in the image you must refer to them as {name}.
ONLY describe the most important elements of the image.
If it is a work of art, do not include the artist's name or the title of the work.
Do NOT use any ambiguous language.
Do NOT mention any text that is in the image.
This is a follow-shot filming a character gesticulating wildly while speaking

This is a follow-shot filming a character gesticulating wildly while speaking, This is a video of Lisa, a young woman standing in a modern subway station. She has long, wavy blonde hair and fair skin, with light blue eyes and subtle makeup that accentuates her natural features. She is wearing a pink, spaghetti-strap crop top that reveals her midriff and high-waisted blue jeans. White earphones are plugged into her ears, with the cord hanging down to her chest. Lisa is holding the camera with her right hand, taking a selfie. In the background, the subway platform is visible with other passengers, including a man in a black shirt and backpack walking away. The station has a sleek, modern design with white and gray tiles, yellow safety lines on the platform, and overhead fluorescent lights. The ceiling has a grid pattern with ventilation panels. The overall lighting is bright and even, highlighting Lisa's features and the clean, modern environment of the subway station.

watermark, channel logo, vivid/saturated tones, overexposed, static, blurry/unclear details, subtitles, style, artwork, painting, frame, still/immobile, overall grayish, worst quality, low quality, JPEG compression artifacts, ugly, damaged/incomplete, extra fingers, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn face, deformity, disfigured, malformed limbs, fused fingers, frozen/still frame, cluttered background, three legs, many people in the background, walking backwards
The effect of generating video from images is not ideal

This is a photograph of a young woman, referred to as Lisa, standing in a modern subway station. Lisa has fair skin, long blonde hair with loose waves, and blue eyes. She is wearing a pink, spaghetti-strap crop top that reveals her midriff and high-waisted blue jeans. White earphones are plugged into her ears, with the cord hanging down to her chest. She has a neutral expression with slightly parted lips. The subway station has a clean, modern design with white and gray tiled flooring and yellow safety lines near the edge of the platform. The ceiling has a grid pattern with fluorescent lights. In the background, there are a few other people, including a man in a black shirt and jeans walking away from the camera. The platform extends into the distance with train tracks visible. Lisa's outfit and the overall setting suggest a casual, everyday scenario. The photograph captures a moment of stillness in a busy urban environment.
